data.title: Update brainstorm SKILL.md Phase 2 to load complexity-gate prompt and enforce proposal requirements
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE (RED test assertion created by Task 8307-3cd0; this task makes test_brainstorm_references_complexity_gate pass)

## What to Change
In `plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md`, in Phase 2 (Approach Proposals):

### 1. Add Read instruction with hard error at the start of Phase 2
```
Read `plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/complexity-gate.md`. If the file cannot be read, STOP and emit:
"ERROR: complexity-gate.md not found at plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/complexity-gate.md — create this file before running brainstorm Phase 2."
```

### 2. Enforce simple baseline requirement
Require at least 3 proposals where one is a genuine simple baseline — the simplest implementation that satisfies all done definitions. The sandbagging prohibition from complexity-gate.md applies: the simple baseline must not include scalability caveats unless those caveats are grounded in the Phase 1 scale context. A simple baseline that is technically inadequate (would fail basic requirements) is not a valid baseline.

### 3. Complexity gate check for complex proposals
Any proposal that includes: (a) a new library dependency, (b) a performance optimization, or (c) an abstraction referenced by fewer than 3 existing call sites (Rule of Three) — must include a GATE/CHECKED/FINDING/VERDICT block from complexity-gate.md before being presented. If the verdict is FAIL and no justified-complexity path is provided, the proposal must not be presented.

### 4. Scale context propagation
The scale context from Phase 1 (result of scale-inference.md protocol) is passed to Gate 4 (Scale Threshold) when evaluating performance proposals. If Phase 1 scale context was "small scale (default)", Gate 4 returns FAIL for any performance optimization unless the justified-complexity path is satisfied.

## What NOT to Change
- Phase 1 content (handled by Task 5a)
- The approval gate options
- The planning-intelligence log field names established before this epic

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md` contains a Read instruction for `shared/prompts/complexity-gate.md`
  Verify: `grep -q "shared/prompts/complexity-gate.md" plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md`
- [ ] File contains hard-stop error emission for missing complexity-gate.md
  Verify: `grep -q "complexity-gate.md" plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md && grep -qi "ERROR\|cannot be read\|not found" plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md`
- [ ] File references GATE/CHECKED/FINDING/VERDICT format or complexity gate check requirement for proposals
  Verify: `grep -qi "GATE.*VERDICT\|VERDICT\|complexity.*gate\|complexity-gate" plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md`
- [ ] test-complexity-gate-shared-prompt.sh test_brainstorm_references_complexity_gate section passes
  Verify: `bash tests/skills/test-complexity-gate-shared-prompt.sh 2>&1 | grep -E "PASS.*brainstorm|brainstorm.*PASS"`
- [ ] Existing brainstorm tests still pass
  Verify: `bash tests/skills/test-brainstorm-approval-gate.sh && bash tests/skills/test-brainstorm-enrich-in-place.sh && bash tests/skills/test-brainstorm-web-research.sh`
- [ ] `plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci` passes
  Verify: `plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci`
